## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated and `pytest` passes
- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` pass
- [ ] `mypy src` passes
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies added to the core
- [ ] If touching the outbox / jobs / migrations: atomicity & exactly-once tests still hold
